title: KINGLAKE 100 Pcs Plant Clips, Garden Plant Support Clips Vine Clips Flower Stem Clips for Fixing Tomatoes, Vegetables, Cucumbers (Green)
features: 【WEATHER-RESISTTANT】Plant clips are made of durable plastic, heat-resistant and cold-resistant, not easy to damage and aging, reusable and long last.
【EASY TO SNAP AND UNSNAP】Vine clips firmly hold plants stem to stakes, string, wire, trellis or branches in one easy click, easy to unlock and readjust as plants mature.
【NO NEED TYING KNOTS】Just tie all your plants up in just a few minutes, so much faster and easier than using tedious string or wire, and don't worry it will hurt plant stems or hinder their growth.

【GREAT CHOICE FOR VARIOUS PLANTS】Garden clips are very handy for training and supporting vegetables, soft fruit, vines, flowers, climbing plants, such as tomatoes, cucumbers, peas and beans, sunflowers, roses,grape vines, etc.
【WHAT YOU WILL GET】Pack of 100 pcs green plant support clips, enough quantity to meet your need. Using the plant clips make your plants healthier, and certainly make you more productive.
description: Product Description Adjustable Garden Clips for Supporting Plants Weatherproof & Reusable Plant clips are made of premium plastic, heat and cold resistant, not easy to damage and aging, long last and can be reused for next year. Easy to Clips and Remove Vine clips firmly hold plants stem to stakes, string, wire, trellis or branches in one easy lock, easy to unlock and readjust as plants mature. Quick with No Need Knotting Just tie all your plants up in just a few minutes, so much faster and easier than using tedious string or wire, and don't worry it will hurt plant stems or hinder their growth. Multiple ways to use Fixing plant stems to stakes or other supports Holding plants vine to string or trellis Plant stems support each other Branch support clips
